About Strategic Bitcoin Reserve

Strategic Bitcoin Reserve ($SBR) represents a new paradigm in cryptocurrency investment strategy. Built on the Ethereum network, SBR combines traditional reserve principles with modern blockchain technology.

Security

Advanced smart contract architecture ensuring maximum protection.
Liquidity locked: 47 years.

Transparency

Full visibility of transactions and holdings on the Ethereum blockchain

Innovation

Cutting-edge DeFi integration and strategic partnerships
